title: Philips Series 7000 All-in-one Trimmer, 15-in-1 Multigroom for face, Head and Body, One Tool - Ultimate Precision, 26 Length Settings (0.5-20 mm) (Model MG7950/15)
features: 15 tools for all of your grooming needs: beard trimming, body grooming, hair clipping, nose/ear trimming. 26 length settings (0.5-16 mm) for any beard style.
Precision trimming comb: offers 11 length settings between 1-3 mm in 0.2 mm precision steps for an even trim at the exact length you want
Self-sharpening stainless steel blades: remain as sharp as day one for long-lasting performance. No oil required.
30% faster trimming*: extra-wide 41 mm stainless steel hair clipper cuts more hair with every stroke.
Powerful lithium-ion battery: 120 minutes runtime, 5 minute quick charge option. USB-A charging (power adapter not included).
description: Product Description This all-in-one trimmer offers 15 tools to conveniently trim and style your facial hair, clip your hair and groom your body, offering 26 length settings from 0.5 to 20 mm. Craft your personal look with this versatile trimmer, with self-sharpening stainless steel blades that stay as sharp as day one without oiling for a precise trim. The precision trimming comb delivers a consistent trim in 0.2 mm precision steps at the exact length you want. Achieve 30% faster* hair trimming with the extra-wide 41 mm hair clipper that cuts through more hair in every stroke. The narrow design of the precision trimmer attachment makes it easy to create fine details around your mouth. Clean up cheeks, chin and neck with the full metal blade to finish your look. Shave comfortably below the neck with the body groomer attachment, including a unique skin-protection system that guards sensitive areas. Charging and cleaning the device is easy and convenient: the trimmer is 100% showerproof and therefore can be easily cleaned under the tab. The powerful lithium-ion battery offers 120 minutes of runtime as well as a 5 minutes quick charge option. Thanks to the battery indicator for low, charging and full, you always know what the battery status is. USB-A charging, wall adapter not included. *Compared to the Philips All-in-One trimmer without the 41 mm cutting element Directions Basic instructions: charging, cleaning, cordless and cordless use and maintenance with a brush. Safety Warning Use with caution near eyes and other sensitive areas. Keep away from water when plugged in. Do not use if damaged. Keep out of reach of children. See more
